Tune the levers below to match this OEM's economics, then move to any tab — every change recomputes the full chain (sub-scores → DHI → band → trend → alerts → benchmarks) live.

Deterministic recompute engine · Overall DHI = weighted sum of seven normalized dimension scores. What-if levers apply calibrated marginal sensitivities to the affected dimension, then re-derive DHI, band, trend, alerts and peer benchmarks across the whole chain. All figures are synthetic and must be replaced with client actuals before any credit, territory or recovery decision.
